title: Sweetums Cookies
body_text:
There is a famous phrase that women use in certain groups "Don't be a wife to a boyfriend".  It just means you shouldn't be giving your all to people who don't really care that much about you.

But the fact of the matter is that dudes have a similar thing just not an official slogan like the women do.  So like, what that other woman over there is trying to do is get wife privileges without even being a girlfriend.

All the stories you have heard about what a lovely nice guy I am, I'm not actually that nice of a guy in general, most people call me an absolute prick even, but the stories you heard about how nice and kind I am is the reputation of how I treat my girlfriends, not random strangers.

So that woman is trying to get wife privileges without even being a girlfriend... how exactly do you expect me to respond to that?

You do not get both no, never.  Either we are spouses and glory, but thats not a thing for just random humans, and then you stalk me around because I'm nice to my spouse thinking you will get the same... what the heck is wrong with your head?
